summary: Iteration 46: Tested League Schedule Import feature for iWhistle basketball referee manager app. All 9 features PASS. The multi-step wizard (Upload > League Setup > Map Referees > Review Games) works correctly. File upload parses Excel correctly (27 games across 10 nights, 6 referee names detected). Import creates tournament + games in Firestore successfully.

import_league_schedule_button_visible.detail: Green 'Import League Schedule' button visible on Manager > Tournaments tab with CalendarRange icon

league_import_dialog_opens.detail: Dialog opens with title 'Import League Schedule' and description about creating season with games and referee assignments

step_indicator_shows_4_steps.detail: Step indicator shows: Upload > League Setup > Map Referees > Review Games

file_upload_accepts_xlsx.detail: Dropzone accepts .xlsx/.xls files, shows format instructions. File input has accept='.xlsx,.xls'

league_setup_step_fields.detail: Shows Name (auto-filled from file), Location*, Courts, Division, Pay Per Game fields. Badge shows '27 games across 10 nights'

map_referees_step.detail: Shows 6 detected referee names (Brett, James, Osei, Shaheen, Shawn, Wayne) with dropdown selectors to map to system referees

review_games_step.detail: Shows 27 game rows with date grouping (Wednesday dates), time slots (19:00, 20:00, 21:00), and Home/Away team input fields

import_creates_tournament_and_games.detail: Import button creates league tournament + 27 games in Firestore. New tournament 'ADULT BASKETBALL Spring 2026(Wednesday Nights)' appears in list

done_step_shows_success.detail: Done step shows green checkmark, 'League Import Complete', '27 games created', '0 referee assignments' (0 because no refs were mapped), and Close button

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Multi-step wizard with proper state management and step transitions
GOOD: Excel parser correctly handles grouped row format with dates, times, and referee names
GOOD: Auto-matching of referee names by partial name match is a nice UX feature
GOOD: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
GOOD: Proper error handling with toast notifications for import failures
MINOR: Console shows Firebase deprecation warning about enableIndexedDbPersistence() - consider updating to FirestoreSettings.cache
seed_data_creation: Created new tournament 'ADULT BASKETBALL Spring 2026(Wednesday Nights)' with 27 games via import feature
context_for_next_testing_agent: League Schedule Import feature fully working. Test file at /tmp/schedule.xlsx contains ADULT BASKETBALL Spring 2026 league data with 8 regular game nights (3 games each at 19:00, 20:00, 21:00) + 2 tournament dates = 27 total games. Parser detects 6 referee names. Import creates tournament and games in Firestore. Previous iteration 45 tested Tournament Payouts feature - all passing.
